title: Crumbly Mars Bar Stir-Fry
description: A spicy solo-dinner dish inspired by traditional Slovakian cuisine featuring a crumbly texture made with Mars bars and a quick stir-fry base that's jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: Mars Bars
ingredients.notes: Use vegan or gluten-free Mars Bars if available.

instructions: Chop the bell peppers, onion, and red onion into small pieces.
If using Mars Bars, break them into smaller pieces. For a vegan version, use plant-based chocolate bars instead.
Sauté the minced garlic in vegetable oil until fragrant.
Add chopped vegetables to the pan and sauté for 5 minutes or until they start to soften.
Stir in soy sauce, salt, and chili flakes (if using), mix well, and continue cooking for another minute.
Fold in Mars Bar pieces into the vegetable mixture and stir gently to combine evenly with the vegetables.
Serve hot as a quick jain-friendly solo-dinner dish.
